Variables.Name: Mesh
Variables.Description: Mesh to use on the spline

Variables.Name: bCenterH
Variables.Description: Whether to automatically center the mesh horizontally on the spline

Variables.Name: CenterAdjust
Variables.Description: Tweak to center the mesh correctly on the spline

Variables.Name: bScaleToWidth
Variables.Description: Whether to scale the mesh to fit the width of the spline

Variables.Name: Orientation_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Orientation of the spline mesh, X=Up or Y=Up

Variables.Name: ForwardAxis
Variables.Description: Chooses the forward axis for the spline mesh orientation

Variables.Name: UpAxis
Variables.Description: Chooses the up axis for the spline mesh orientation
